title: South Indian Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: South Indian Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
